features.name: Create
features.description: Method defines a create/register operation

features.name: Read / Resolve
features.description: Method defines a resolution algorithm

features.name: Update
features.description: Method supports updating the DID Document

features.name: Deactivate
features.description: Method supports deactivating/revoking a DID

features.name: Key Rotation
features.description: Keys can be rotated without changing the DID

features.name: Key Recovery
features.description: Method defines a key recovery mechanism (social recovery, backup keys, etc.)

features.name: Multi-Signature
features.description: Method supports multi-sig or threshold signing

features.name: DID Log / History
features.description: Method maintains an append-only log of DID Document changes

features.name: Verifiable Credentials
features.description: Method is designed to work with W3C VCs

features.name: Selective Disclosure
features.description: Method supports per-field disclosure (SD-JWT, AnonCreds, etc.)

features.name: Status List / Revocation
features.description: Method defines or references a credential revocation mechanism

features.name: DIDComm v2
features.description: Method supports or references DIDComm messaging

features.name: Presentation Exchange
features.description: Method references DIF Presentation Exchange or OID4VP

features.name: Credential API / CHAPI
features.description: Method integrates with browser Credential API or CHAPI

features.name: Universal Resolver Driver
features.description: Method has a published DIF Universal Resolver driver

features.name: JSON-LD Context
features.description: Method publishes a JSON-LD context for DID Documents

features.name: DNS Discovery
features.description: Method supports DNS TXT record discovery

features.name: Agent Framework Integration
features.description: Method is integrated into at least one agent framework (Credo, ACA-Py, Veramo, etc.)

features.name: Privacy Architecture
features.description: Method has a documented privacy architecture beyond basic key-only resolution

features.name: Zero-Knowledge Proofs
features.description: Method supports ZKP-based verification

features.name: Pairwise DIDs
features.description: Method supports creating unique DIDs per relationship

features.name: Encrypted Data Vault
features.description: Method defines or references encrypted personal data storage

features.name: Post-Quantum Ready
features.description: Method defines or reserves post-quantum key types or migration path

features.name: Threat Model
features.description: Spec includes a documented threat model or security considerations section

features.name: Crypto-Shredding
features.description: Method supports permanent data erasure via key deletion

features.name: Trust Model
features.description: Method defines a trust hierarchy or trust framework

features.name: Controller Hierarchy
features.description: Method supports parent-child or organizational DID hierarchies

features.name: LEI / Org Binding
features.description: Method supports binding DIDs to legal entity identifiers

features.name: Community Charter
features.description: Method has published governance and contribution guidelines
